overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game showing a cozy medieval common room with a large stone fireplace. A character sits on the floor in the foreground while warm firelight illuminates the Gothic stone architecture and decorative rugs. The scene features high-quality atmospheric lighting and detailed textures typical of modern game engines.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval common room with central fireplace

seated in an armchair near the wall sconce, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large Gothic stone fireplace with carved wooden mantel and burning fire
animated flames providing warm orange illumination to the room
ornate patterned rug covering the stone floor in front of the fireplace
large framed landscape painting hanging on the stone wall
lit wall-mounted lamp with warm glow near the archway
green ivy vines growing up the stone wall beside the fireplace

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval common room centered on a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire. The camera remains fixed behind a sitting character in the foreground, showing ornate rugs, Gothic architecture, and warm firelight illuminating the space. An NPC sits in an armchair in the background near a lit wall sconce, creating a cozy, atmospheric scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a cozy medieval common room centered on the warmth of a roaring fireplace. It begins from a fixed perspective behind a character sitting on the floor, where the flickering firelight casts deep shadows across ornate rugs and Gothic stone architecture. As the eye wanders through the space, the warm glow extends toward the periphery, illuminating the detailed textures of the room's interior. The scene finally settles on an NPC resting in a distant armchair near a lit wall sconce, completing the sense of quiet companionship within the hearth-lit hall.
